'''Yanci''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Miner/Legends|miner]] who studied [[Doctor/Legends|medicine]] and sympathized with [[Workers]] of the planet [[New Apsolon/Legends|New Apsolon]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
In [[41 BBY/Legends|41 BBY]], Yanci and her companions, [[Kevta]] and [[Bini (miner)|Bini]] met [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. However, they mistook them for their enemies, [[Absolutes]] and attacked them. Obi-Wan was injured in the attack, but after realizing their mistake, Yanci used her medical knowledge to heal Obi-Wan's leg. After he was healed, and the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], along with [[Eritha]] had left the mining facility, the Absolutes attacked the mine. Yanci ran for the Jedi, but when they came back, the Absolutes had already finished their massacre. Yanci's friends, Bini as well as Kevta, whom she was in love with, were killed.

{{Char-stub}}
